text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond has been in a slump recently, so
I've invited her to a shrine...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: All right. I prayed for everyone's good health.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I also prayed for my family. All there is to do now
is head back.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Is something wrong? You look skeptical...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Actually, I left myself out intentionally.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's true I haven't been at my best. And it's not
that I believe the gods can't assist me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
However, I'd like to avoid relying on outside
assistance as much as possible, divine or
otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to try get through this on my own.
...That's how I feel.
choice_data_list: Then, why not pray for something else?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Something... else?
Such as?
choice_data_list: You could pray they watch you get through it.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, sure! Hehe! I'll go pray one more time,
then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(O gods... Please watch as I overcome any
challenge that appears before me!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (With the help of those who support me!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay, then. Now I'm definitely finished.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I feel like I can train even harder knowing
that the gods are watching over me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I can't let this slump slow me down. Would you
give me some coaching as soon as we get back?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, a cheerful Satono Diamond makes a
full recovery back to her usual self.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Well, shall we head b—aaack!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, the sky suddenly turns dark and it
begins to rain!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
As soon as I say I'll overcome any challenge, this
happens?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Am I being tested on whether or not my
determination is genuine?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond returns to school in the pouring
rain, and remains in her slump for some time.
